message:
feat(terraform): add state inspection, plan generation, and module management

- state.rs: StateInspector with full audit trail, resource queries (126 tests)
- plan.rs: TerraformPlan with deterministic hashing, PlanRenderer (129 tests)
- modules.rs: ModuleGraph, ModuleSource parsing (registry/git/local/http) (129 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
